message:
fix(installer): move show_header after resolve_version for version display

Reorder main() so that show_header() is called after resolve_version()
instead of before. This ensures the VERSION variable is populated before
the header renders, allowing the "Install target version: X.Y.Z" line
added in the previous commit to display the actual resolved version
rather than "latest (auto)" fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2041,11 +2041,10 @@ print_summary() {
 }
 
 main() {
-  show_header
-
   validate_options
   load_existing_state
   resolve_version
+  show_header
   detect_existing_pi
   choose_adoption_mode
   choose_dest_for_adoption
